payload.title: MTA Inspector General Presentation
payload.publisher: Office of the MTA Inspector General

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Office of the MTA Inspector General

payload.entity_name: Office of the MTA Inspector General
payload.description: Providing independent oversight of MTA operations since 1983

evidence_refs.source_quote: Office of the MTA Inspector General
Providing independent oversight of MTA operations since 1983

payload.claim_text: Vicious assaults on our hardworking MTA colleagues cannot be tolerated. Albany must pass proposed legislation increasing the punishments against those who violently attack our transit workers.
payload.subject: Worker Safety

evidence_refs.source_quote: Vicious assaults on our hardworking MTA colleagues cannot be tolerated.
Albany must pass proposed legislation increasing the punishments against those who violently attack our transit workers.

payload.claim_text: MTA management had ignored its own policy to document and monitor known asbestos in the East New York Bus Depot for years.
payload.subject: Asbestos Management

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA management had ignored its own policy to document and monitor known asbestos in the East New York Bus Depot for years.

payload.claim_text: Integrating timekeeping and payroll systems is a priority initiative which must be given support and attention to help protect the agency against fraud and abuse.
payload.subject: Overtime Reform

evidence_refs.source_quote: Integrating timekeeping and payroll systems is a priority initiative which must be given support and attention to help protect the agency against fraud and abuse.

tool_args.label: Money Saved on Outside Sandy Monitors to Date

payload.description: By having the OIG and other MTA agencies do this monitoring work, instead of third-party monitors, internal MTA estimates show the MTA saving $20 million for current construction projects, and up to $48 million for total construction projects.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MONEY SAVED ON OUTSIDE SANDY MONITORS TO DATE 4 : $20,000,000
internal MTA estimates show the MTA saving $20 million for current construction projects, and up to $48 million for total construction projects.

tool_args.label: Money Saved on Outside Sandy Monitors - Total Construction Projects

payload.scope: Hurricane Sandy Recovery Grants monitoring - total construction projects

evidence_refs.source_quote: internal MTA estimates show the MTA saving $20 million for current construction projects, and up to $48 million for total construction projects.

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

payload.description: MTA Board Meeting where MTA Inspector General Carolyn Pokorny presented

payload.claim_text: Metro-North Machinist created safety risk: brought woman onto MTA property for intimate meeting, while on overtime; misused personal vehicle.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Machinist created safety risk: brought woman onto MTA property for intimate meeting, while on overtime; misused personal vehicle. #2020-27

tool_args.label: NYC Transit Traffic Checker FMLA Abuse

payload.claim_text: NYC Transit Traffic Checker abused FMLA and sick time to gamble in Atlantic City.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYC Transit Traffic Checker abused FMLA and sick time to gamble in Atlantic City. #2020-26

tool_args.label: Former NYC Transit Subway Conductor Theft

payload.claim_text: Former NYC Transit Subway Conductor charged for allegedly stealing $114,000 in workers compensation.

extra_fields.case: People v. Giovanni Seminero, Brooklyn DA

evidence_refs.source_quote: Former NYC Transit Subway Conductor charged for allegedly stealing $114,000 in workers compensation. People v. Giovanni Seminero, Brooklyn DA

payload.claim_text: LIRR foremen claimed excessive OT & double-time pay for 'travel time' hours not provided for in their CBA for over $41,000.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR foremen claimed excessive OT & double-time pay for 'travel time' hours not provided for in their CBA for over $41,000. #2019-22

payload.claim_text: LIRR Utility Worker, on at least 16 occasions, failed to remain on duty during his full shift, including hours he earned double overtime.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR Utility Worker, on at least 16 occasions, failed to remain on duty during his full shift, including hours he earned double overtime. #2020-04

payload.claim_text: LIRR Managing Engineer remained on LIRR payroll while living in North Carolina; LIRR supervisors provided misleading and inaccurate information about his teleworking status to LIRR's Executive Management.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR Managing Engineer remained on LIRR payroll while living in North Carolina; LIRR supervisors provided misleading and inaccurate information about his teleworking status to LIRR's Executive Management. #2020-22

tool_args.label: LIRR and NYC Transit Overtime Fraud

payload.claim_text: LIRR and NYC Transit Employees claimed extraordinary overtime hours fueled by fraudulent claims; defendants were being paid while at home, on family vacations or bowling. The charges are allegations, all defendants are presumed innocent.

extra_fields.case: United States v. Caputo, et al., SDNY U.S. Attorney's Office

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR and NYC Transit Employees claimed extraordinary overtime hours fueled by fraudulent claims; defendants were being paid while at home, on family vacations or bowling. The charges are allegations, all defendants are presumed innocent. United States v. Caputo, et al., SDNY U.S. Attorney's Office

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
